历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17508 → 24634 → 21691 → 24360 → 23383, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 23383, slightly higher than 2024 but still in the high range of recent years. Enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 202 → 193 → 192 → 194 → 190, with a plan of 188 for 2026, a decrease of 2 from 2025, indicating a slight reduction in enrollment and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 33rd, with stable rankings in the 30–33 range in recent years, making it a top-tier science and engineering university in China. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to school management and teacher ethics. Its Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure and above-average application attention. In 2022, there was a signal of a cutoff anomaly, but no obvious enrollment irregularities have occurred in recent years. Disciplines such as Information and Communication Engineering (A+), Electronic Science and Technology (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Instrument Science and Technology (A-), Optical Engineering (A-), and Management Science and Engineering (A-) are top-tier, especially in the fields of electronic information and computer science, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of electronic information/communication majors is highly recommended, and computer science majors remain highly popular, which aligns well with the core majors of the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, boosting application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hebei Province is about 609,800 (a significant increase from 363,040 in the Physics Category in 2025), intensifying competition. The university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, not in Hebei. Hebei examinees have a strong willingness to apply across provinces for strong electronic information universities, so the regional factor has a neutral to slightly positive impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment plans for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in Hebei Province, and the sustained high social popularity of electronic information majors, competition in the Physics Category in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. Based on the 2025 baseline of 23383, the predicted minimum ranking is about 23285, with a range of 22785–23785.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Electronic Information (Information and Communication) (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.)

- Software Engineering (National Excellent Engineer Education and Training Program Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 22785–23785, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors can be considered as reach targets (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safe choices. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China has nationally top-tier electronic information and computer science disciplines, with sustained high social popularity and intense application competition. It is suggested that candidates reasonably match their rankings with major preferences when filling out their applications.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校。学校以电子信息科技为核心特色，在工科领域享有极高声誉，其 医学类专业依托学校强大的工科背景，在医学与电子信息交叉领域具有独特优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学作为热门专业竞争激烈。电子科技大学医学类在河北省仅设临床医学和护理学两个专业，招生规模较小（17人），稀缺性推高竞 争程度。2026年护理学升级为AI交叉创新人才培养实验班，有望吸引更多考生关注。学校位于成都，作为新一线城市对河北考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算及近年位次趋势分析，预测2026年电子科技大学医学类在河北省最低录取位次约为22634名，位次区间为22294至22974名。相比2025年（23383名）位次略 有上升（更难进），主要受缩招及医学热度持续影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for UESTC's medical programs in Hebei Province from 2021 to 2025 were 17508, 24634, 21691, 24360, and 23383 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2021, the enrollment plan was 12 students, expanded to 14 in 2022, further expanded to 18 in 2023, and remained at 18 in 2024-2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 17 students (13 for Clinical Medicine, 4 for Nursing), a reduction of about 5.56%, exerting some downward pressure on rankings (smaller ranking number, easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: UESTC is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key university in the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected for the national Double First-Class construction. The university is centered on electronic information technology, enjoys a high reputation in engineering, and its medical programs leverage the strong engineering background, offering unique advantages in the intersection of medicine and electronic information.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have seen rising popularity in recent years, with Clinical Medicine being highly competitive. UESTC's medical programs in Hebei only offer two majors: Clinical Medicine and Nursing, with a small enrollment of 17 students, increasing competition due to scarcity. In 2026, the Nursing program is upgraded to an AI Cross-Innovation Talent Training Experimental Class, which is expected to attract more candidates. The university is located in Chengdu, a new first-tier city that has some appeal to Hebei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and recent ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for UESTC's medical programs in Hebei Province in 2026 is approximately 22634, with a ranking range of 22294 to 22974. Compared to 2025 (23383), the ranking is slightly higher (harder to enter), mainly due to the enrollment reduction and sustained medical program popularity.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Shahe Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Nursing (AI Cross-Innovation Talent Training Experimental Class) (Shahe Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: UESTC's medical programs only offer two majors with a significant ranking gap. Clinical Medicine has historically much higher rankings than Nursing. It is recommended that candidates within the predicted ranking range use Nursing as the primary choice and Clinical Medicine as a reach goal.
